Name: Account
Description: The account to which the contact belongs

Name: AccountIsCustomer
Description: Indicates if account is a customer

Name: AccountIsSupplier
Description: Indicates if account is a supplier

Name: AccountMainContact
Description: Reference to the main contact of the account

Name: AddressStreetNumberSuffix
Description: Street number suffix of the address

Name: BirthName
Description: Obsolete. Please don't use this field anymore as it may overwrite LastName.

Name: BirthNamePrefix
Description: Obsolete. Please don't use this field anymore as it may overwrite MiddleName.

Name: CustomField
Description: Custom field endpoint. Provided only for the Exact Online Premium users.

Name: FirstName
Description: First name. Provide at least first name or last name to create a new contact

Name: FullName
Description: Full name (First name Middle name Last name)

Name: IdentificationDocument
Description: Reference to the identification document of the contact

Name: IdentificationUser
Description: Reference to the user responsible for identification

Name: IsAnonymised
Description: Indicates whether the contact is anonymised.

Name: IsMailingExcluded
Description: Indicates whether contacts are excluded from the marketing list

Name: IsMainContact
Description: Indicates if this is the main contact of the linked account

Name: LastName
Description: Last name. Provide at least first name or last name to create a new contact

Name: LeadPurpose
Description: Reference to purpose of an contact

Name: LeadSource
Description: Reference to source of an contact

Name: MarketingNotes
Description: The user should be able to do a full text search on these notes to gather contacts for a marketing campaign

Name: Person
Description: Reference to the personal information of this contact such as name, gender, address etc.

Name: Picture
Description: This field is write-only. The picture can be downloaded through PictureUrl and PictureThumbnailUrl.

Name: PictureThumbnailUrl
Description: Url to retrieve the picture thumbnail
